## Problem Statement

<!-- Is this feature request related to a problem? Describe the pain point clearly. -->
<!-- Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually switch between..." -->

<!-- Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Describe them here. -->

## Use Case

<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? How would it be used day-to-day? -->

## Scope

<!-- Which part of the project does this affect? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Next.js Backend (API)
- [ ] Memory Backend (Python / Mem0)
- [ ] Interview Copilot
- [ ] Voice Agent
- [ ] Action Menu
- [ ] Documentation
